scripts.test-changed: yarn workspaces foreach --all run test --since HEAD
scripts.build-changed: yarn workspaces foreach --all run build --since HEAD
scripts.build: yarn run build:ts && yarn run build:components
scripts.publish-canary: yarn run build && yarn workspaces foreach --all version prerelease --preid alpha.$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) --ignore-scripts --force-publish --no-push --no-git-tag-version --yes && git update-index --assume-unchanged $(git ls-files | tr '\n' ' ') && yarn workspaces foreach --all publish from-package --no-git-reset --pre-dist-tag next --force-publish --no-push --no-git-tag-version --yes && git update-index --no-assume-unchanged $(git ls-files | tr '\n' ' ') && git checkout .
scripts.postinstall: yarn run build && yarn run prepare
